name: multi-provider-ai
description: Route AI requests across OpenRouter and Google Gemini with automatic fallback. Config stored in DB (no redeploy on key change), per-provider model selection, structured JSON output with repair, token budget per provider. Works with FastAPI, Express, or any Python/Node backend.

interface.longDescription: Route AI requests across OpenRouter and Google Gemini with automatic fallback. Config stored in DB (no redeploy on key change), per-provider model selection, structured JSON output with repair, token budget per provider. Works with FastAPI, Express, or any Python/Node backend.
defaultPrompt: Use Multi Provider AI neste projeto.
